name: 200W Power Supply / Adapter – 12V/24V – IP67 Rated
description: High-Capacity 200W Output: Supports powerful, energy-efficient lighting for various applications 12V/24V Voltage Options: Flexible output to suit your project needs IP67 Waterproof Rating: Durable and reliable in harsh weather, perfect for indoor and outdoor use Ideal for LED Strips & Rope Lights: Improve ambiance in decks, patios, walkways, driveways, and landscaping Compatible with LED Modules: Great for signage, architectural lighting, and display cases Efficient & Reliable: Simplifies lighting projects with cost-effective, long-lasting residential and commercial spaces performance
short_desc: Specifications: Output Wattage: Max 200W Output Voltage: 12VDC / 24VDC Output Current: Max 16.7A at 12V Max 8.3A at 24V Input Voltage: 100–277VAC Input Current: 2.95–1.72A Certifications: UL Listed, IP65 Dimming Type: TRIAC, 0-10V, 1-10V, 10V PWM, Resistance Dim Dimensions: 242 × 67 × 22.8 mm Lifespan: 50,000 hours Use: LED Modules, Strip Lights, Low Voltage Lights, etc.
